---
title: "Angler Contributions"
editor: visual
lightbox: true
---

### This page is dedicated to the anglers who have contributed to the project!

Thank you all who have called in and submitted photos of your smiling faces for my project!
I greatly appreciate your contributions and enthusiasm for my project!

::: {style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px"}
![Angler Billy Gunter](Billy%20Gunter.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![Angler Jose Francisco](Jose%20Francisco.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![Angler David Keyes](David%20Keyes.jpg){fig-align="center"}
:::

![Angler Tracy Alanquest](Tracy%20Alanquest.jpg)
